name: All-American Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 350°F.
2. In a small, heavy-bottomed saucepan, melt chocolate and shortening (or butter), stirring over low heat until smooth and melted. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the chocolate mixture, milk, and eggs to the dry ingredients. Beat until smooth.
5. Spread the batter evenly into two greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
6. Bake for 30-to-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 5 minutes before turning them out onto wire racks.
